seoTitle: Scotts Brook vs Secret Harbour — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Scotts Brook and Secret Harbour. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Scotts Brook vs Secret Harbour: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scotts Brook and Secret Harbour.
heading: Scotts Brook vs Secret Harbour — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scotts Brook, Western Australia and Secret Harbour, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Secret Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Scotts Brook (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scotts Brook or Secret Harbour safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scotts Brook has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Secret Harbour scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scotts Brook scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Secret Harbour scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scotts Brook or Secret Harbour?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Secret Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
